series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule contains reconciliation documents (bank statements, receipt books, deposit tickets, withdrawal paperwork, evidence of reconciliation and correction) that reference ODPS charitable accounts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three (3) years from end of fiscal year provided audit by Auditor of State is complete and audit is released. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) years from end of fiscal year provided audit by Auditor of State is complete and audit is released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
